title: Salaar: Part 1 - Ceasefire
tmdbOverview: Set in the fictional dystopian city-state of Khansaar, the film follows the friendship between Deva, a tribesman, and Varadha, the prince of Khansaar. When a coup d'état is planned by his father's ministers and his relatives, Varadha enlists Deva's help to become Khansaar's undisputed ruler.
synopsis: Released in 2023, Salaar: Part 1 - Ceasefire is a action, crime and drama film from India. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a MA 15+ certification (AU rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
